name: Tune
description: Tune — a sleek desktop companion for Claude Code, wrapping the CLI in a fast, frosted-glass chat interface.

scripts.copy:assets: cp src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/ && (cp logo.png logo-rounded.png dist/renderer/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:assets
scripts.start: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron .
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check
